regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Lower Hutt typically charge $70–$100/hr. Supply-and-lay carpet is usually quoted per m²: expect $38–$65/m² for mid-range carpet installed.

businesses.name: Barry Flooring Ltd
businesses.known_for: Carpet installation, stretches, and repairs with over a decade of experience, based in Lower Hutt serving the wider Wellington region.

businesses.name: Butler Flooring
businesses.known_for: High quality carpet and flooring services across the Hutt Valley and Wellington region.

businesses.name: Floor Court
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial flooring solutions serving Lower Hutt, Wellington, Porirua, and Kapiti Coast.
